creator: ijliao@Terry.Dorm10.NCTU.edu.tw
text:
typo in doc/FAQ/preface.sgml

That code in our source tree which falls under the GNU Public License ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ must be "GNU General Public License" (GPL) or GNU Library Public License (GLPL) comes with slightly more ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ must be "GNU Library General Public License (LGPL)" Fix: change "GNU Public License" to "GNU General Public License" change "GNU Library Public License (GLPL)" to "GNU Library General Public License (LGPL)" How-To-Repeat: more doc/FAQ/preface.sgml
